case_title: RONNY TURNER ET AL VS. NICKOLOAS MASTROKYIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, RONNY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF RONNY TURNER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF VALENCIA BANKHEAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NICKOLOS MASTROKYRIAKOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURNER, RONNY BANKHEAD, VALENCIA AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROKRIAKOS, NICKOLOAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANKHEAD, VALENCIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, RONNY BANKHEAD, VALENCIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MASTROKRIAKOS, NICKOLOAS PLAINTIFFS OFFER NO MEDICAL RECORDS OR OTHER COMPETENT EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING THEY WERE INJURED IN THIS INCIDENT. THE PHOTOGRAPHS OF THE PLAINTIFFS' CAR AFTER THE INCIDENT DEMONSTRATE THAT THE COLLISION EXERTED LITTLE FORCE ON THE PLAINTIFFS' CAR AND CONTRADICT PLAINTIFFS' TESTIMONY OF A STRONG IMPACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/31/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MASTROKRIAKOS, NICKOLOAS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TURNER, RONNY BANKHEAD, VALENCIA AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROKRIAKOS, NICKOLOAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-03-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MASTROKRIAKOS, NICKOLOAS
